title: citrus inodora
intro: Citrus inodora, also known as the mayur chandani or mayur champa, is a flowering plant native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus inodora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Citrus inodora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
